message:
feat(messaging): add certificate-carrying request/reply protocol

RequestCertificate: deterministic admission certificate with caller
identity, capability fingerprint, and negotiated service class.
ReplyCertificate: callee-produced evidence of honest reply resolution
with payload digest and service latency.
ChunkedReplyObligation: obligation family for streamed replies with
bounded chunk tracking and completeness enforcement.

15 new tests for certificates and chunked reply lifecycle.
Closes asupersync-8w83i.5.2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
